verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My heart is so thirsty to be with you, There's a freedom into your life,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There'll never be, there'll never be someone like you, With so much joy so much love for me,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want to be filled with joy dancing for my king, and Lord offering my praise to you,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Ha-lle-lu-jah, Jesus, Jesus, I love you, I love you.
